hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q '\.vue$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"CONTENT GUIDE REMINDER: Check these Thryv Product Content Guide rules in the file you just edited:
1. Sentence case for ALL UI text — never title case
2. Periods on complete sentences in body copy/descriptions/alerts — NOT on buttons, labels, or headlines
3. No ampersands — spell out and
4. No ellipses — rephrase instead
5. Use customer not user in visible UI copy
6. Button labels: start with a verb, under 25 chars
7. No are you sure phrasing in modals
8. No please — direct, confident copy
Fix any violations before proceeding."}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
